RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.units module

class RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.units.Units

Bases: object

Units for quantities in manure manager output objects.

urea = 'g_per_L'
manure_urea = 'g_per_L'
urine = 'kg'
manure_urine = 'kg'
urine_total_ammoniacal_nitrogen = 'kg'
manure_total_ammoniacal_nitrogen = 'kg'

manure_nitrogen = 'kg'

housing_ammonia = 'kg'
storage_ammonia = 'kg'

manure_volume = 'm^3'
cleaning_water_volume = 'm^3'
